# Screenshots Marketing

## Overview
Creates marketing screenshots and product mockups optimized for landing pages, social media, app store listings, and print materials.

## Best Practices
- **Clean backgrounds**: Product in context or clean gradient
- **Accurate content**: Realistic data, no lorem ipsum
- **Device frames**: Browser window or phone bezel for context
- **Highlight features**: Callout boxes, arrows, or zoom circles
- **Consistent sizing**: Same aspect ratio across set

## Types
- Feature screenshot (product in use)
- Before/after comparison
- Dashboard or analytics view
- Mobile app screen with device frame
- Split-screen comparison

## Technical Specs
- Retina resolution (2x for mobile, 1.5-2x for web)
- PNG for screenshots, JPEG for photos
- Keep file size under 250KB
- Consider dark mode versions
